title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: I'm going to have some breakfast and a cup of coffee and then the whole family will gather in the living room to start opening all of these gifts.
So we are going to open gifts and then we have a few other fun activities planned this afternoon.
Now we are going to make a gingerbread house.
Now I'm in the kitchen with my mom and we are going to make some homemade Christmas cookies.
But we are going to make them Christmasy by adding red and green M&Ms on top of the cookies.

title: will / shall
examples: I'm going to have some breakfast and a cup of coffee and then the whole family will gather in the living room to start opening all of these gifts.
We'll see you on Friday.
They'll probably give you a free membership when they see that.
It will be the perfect treat later with a cup of hot cocoa while we watch a Christmas movie.
But it doesn't look like a lot of dough, so we'll see.

title: When I do / When I've done
examples: They'll probably give you a free membership when they see that.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: because I couldn't wait to see if Santa came and if he left me some gifts under the tree.
This stuff is dangerous because you can't taste the alcohol at all. It tastes like chocolate milk almost. Be careful with this.
I'm like, could I be? I use it at the gym.
So it's got enough that you can wind it once.
I can do more get ready with these.

title: may / might (possibility)
examples: I might have to steal a small bite of it before we bake it.

title: have to / must
examples: I might have to steal a small bite of it before we bake it.

title: would (habit/conditional)
examples: It is so nice to be home for the holidays. It's funny because when I was young I would be up at 5 a.m.

title: Can/Could/Would you...?
examples: I'm like, could I be? I use it at the gym.

title: Passive (is done / was done)
examples: So I've gotten one every year since I was born.
It looks very delicious, but it says that this is supposed to make two dozen cookies, which is 24 cookies.

title: have something done
examples: Got a friend named Benny.
